title: SignedObjectEnvelope
description: Protocol-owned detached single-signature envelope. The signature covers the RFC 8785 JCS canonical bytes of the payload before envelope fields are attached. Additional attestations are modeled as separate signed objects.

signatureBlock.description: Reusable detached signature block shared across signed protocol objects.

alg.description: Signature algorithm identifier for the detached payload signature. MVP allows ed25519 only.

key_id.description: Canonical signer key-id algorithm profile. Signature key IDs use the deterministic public-key-derived format key_sha256:<64-lowercase-hex>.

key_id_value.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hex key identifier derived from canonical public-key bytes. Topology-neutral and never a path, username, or local keystore handle.

signature.description: Base64-encoded detached signature bytes over the RFC 8785 JCS payload bytes.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for signed object envelopes.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this signed envelope.

payload_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the detached payload object carried by this envelope.

payload_schema_version.description: Exact schema version for the detached payload object carried by this envelope.

schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the nested payload object.

schema_version.description: Exact schema version for the nested payload object.

payload.description: Detached payload object whose canonical RFC 8785 JCS bytes are signed by the envelope signature.

signature_input.description: Canonicalization and signing-input contract used for the detached payload signature.

signature.description: Detached signature block covering the canonical payload bytes.
